max_coverage.notes: Emit a species label for almost everything (high coverage).

balanced.notes: Better reliability per emitted label at ~80% coverage on the 69-file eval.

conservative.notes: Only emit when strong and temporally consistent; expect more 'uncertain'.

kenya_balanced.notes: Kenya subset (58 files) tuned for ~80%+ coverage; improves accuracy among covered predictions.

tanzania_balanced.notes: Tanzania (Pugu/Rondo/Pande): field assumption — Galagoides_sp_nov is not expected; use tanzania_site_rules_aggressive for operations or tanzania_site_rules to avoid sp.nov labels. Small eval set; threshold tuning noisy.

kenya_balanced_auto.notes: Auto-tuned from corrected Kenya subset (sp.nov moved to Malawi)

tanzania_balanced_auto.notes: Default Tanzania ops: auto-tuned threshold + context; Galagoides_sp_nov remapped to Paragalago_rondoensis (sp.nov not expected in TZ — see docs/deployment_geographic_assumptions.md). For no remap use tanzania_balanced or pass --postprocess-mode none after --profile.

tanzania_site_rules.notes: Tanzania: sp.nov not expected in range; never leave confident Galagoides_sp_nov — downgrade to uncertain, or remap to Paragalago_rondoensis when polygon says sp.nov unlikely and top2 is rondoensis.

tanzania_site_rules_aggressive.notes: Tanzania operations: Galagoides_sp_nov is unknown here — treat model sp.nov as confusion with P. rondoensis cluster; force sp.nov -> Paragalago_rondoensis for Pugu/Rondo/Pande filenames.

malawi_balanced.notes: Malawi profile: ft4 = cluster fine-tune from retrained improved_best (Mar 2026). Malawi curated + Mkwazi holdout: 100% top-1. Do not use this classifier for Kenya evals; use default improved_best or --classifier-model without Malawi override.

malawi_balanced_auto.notes: Auto-tuned from Malawi (sp.nov) subset. Uses ft4 fine-tuned classifier (from retrained base).
